revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-225

A mixture of cement, aggregate, sand and water which hardens to a solid material with a high crushing strength.

The proportions of cement, aggregate, sand and water may be adjusted to impart specific properties to the concrete.


{{IALAFooter}}
